summary: Complete testing of Attorney Onboarding & Admin Management feature. All backend tests passed (14/14). UI tests verified admin attorneys page with filter pills, approve/reject buttons, reject modal with reason textarea. Attorney dashboard tested for approved attorney (Sarah Mitchell). Email sending is MOCKED (SendGrid not configured) - emails are logged to backend stdout.

1_admin_login.evidence: Login with test@jasper.legal / JasperPro2026! successful, redirects to /dashboard

2_admin_attorneys_page_loads.evidence: Navigate to /admin/attorneys shows 'Attorney Applications' page with data-testid='admin-attorneys-page'

3_table_columns.evidence: Table shows all required columns: Name, Email, Bar #, Country, Specialties, Price, Date, Status, Actions

4_filter_pills.evidence: All 4 filter pills present: All, Pending, Approved, Rejected (data-testid='filter-{status}')

5_pending_filter.evidence: Clicking 'Pending' filter shows only pending attorneys (2 found: jean luc dalmeiren, Test Attorney)

6_approved_filter.evidence: Clicking 'Approved' filter shows only approved attorneys (1 found: Sarah Mitchell)

7_pending_has_approve_reject_buttons.evidence: Pending attorneys have green Approve and red Reject buttons (data-testid='approve-{id}', 'reject-{id}')

8_approved_has_no_approve_reject.evidence: Approved attorneys have only View button, NO Approve/Reject buttons

9_reject_modal_opens.evidence: Clicking Reject opens modal (data-testid='reject-modal') with reason textarea (data-testid='reject-reason-input')

10_backend_get_attorneys.evidence: GET /api/admin/attorneys returns list of attorney profiles with all required fields

13_backend_approve_endpoint.evidence: POST /api/admin/attorneys/{id}/approve changes status to approved (returns 404 for nonexistent)

15_backend_reject_with_reason.evidence: POST /api/admin/attorneys/{id}/reject with reason changes status to rejected

17_attorney_dashboard_approved.evidence: Approved attorney (Sarah Mitchell) dashboard shows metrics, no pending banner

18_email_logging.evidence: Email sending is MOCKED - SendGrid not configured, emails logged to backend stdout

critical_code_review_comments: AdminAttorneys.js is well-implemented with proper filter pills, table columns, and approve/reject buttons
All data-testid attributes are correctly placed for testing
Reject modal correctly requires reason before submission (button disabled when empty)
Backend endpoints properly validate admin access via verify_admin dependency
Email sending is MOCKED (SendGrid not configured) - emails logged instead of sent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attorney onboarding & admin management feature fully tested. Admin page at /admin/attorneys accessible to test@jasper.legal (hardcoded admin). 3 attorneys exist: 2 pending (jean luc dalmeiren, Test Attorney) and 1 approved (Sarah Mitchell). Email sending is MOCKED - SendGrid not configured. To test pending attorney dashboard, need to know password for pending attorney accounts. The approved attorney dashboard shows full features without pending banner.

mocked_apis_list: SendGrid email sending - emails logged to backend stdout instead of sent
